title: GLM generates empty write_file calls on complex content — loop guard added
body: When GLM-4.5 or GLM-4.5-air is asked to write a file with complex content (large template files, multi-paragraph text with special characters), it frequently produces write_file tool calls with missing or empty arguments ({} instead of {path, content}). This causes the tool to return ERROR: 'path', and the model retries the same malformed call 20-50+ times per spoke, burning turns and budget without progress. Observed in S83 and S84 tender runs across framework, minder, basher, nurturator spokes. Root cause: GLM fails to encode complex strings into tool call JSON arguments. Mitigation added: tender.py now tracks consecutive write_file failures and injects a CORRECTION message after 3 consecutive misses, resetting the counter. This breaks the loop and prompts the model to try a different approach.
